title: Brazilian Keto Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and crunchy keto stir fry recipe inspired by Brazilian cuisine. This dish is perfect for a quick and delicious meal.

ingredients.name: Stir Fry Sauce
ingredients.notes: Make sure to choose a sugar-free and keto-friendly sauce

instructions: 1. Cut the bacon into small pieces and cook in a large skillet over medium-high heat until crispy.
2. Remove the cooked bacon from the skillet and set aside.
3. Add the savory pork sausages to the skillet and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes per side.
4. Remove the cooked sausages from the skillet and set aside with the bacon.
5. Add the sliced green bell peppers to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
6. Add the green beans to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
7. In a small bowl, whisk together the stir fry sauce and avocado oil.
8. Pour the sauce into the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables.
9. Add the cooked sausages and bacon back into the skillet and stir to combine.
10. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
11. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
12. Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve hot.
